description: Unify is a warm outbound platform that combines intent signals, AI, and automation to run personalized multichannel sequences.
tagline: Generate more pipeline with warm outbound
overview: Unify helps revenue teams scale outbound with one workflow for prospecting, personalization, and engagement, using intent data and AI to reach ready-to-buy prospects.
what_is: Unify is a growth and outbound sales platform that helps teams reach the right buyers at the right time. It combines AI-powered signals, automation, and personalization in one system, letting teams capture intent, automate research, and run multichannel outreach.

It is strongest for growing pipeline fast and personalizing engagement at scale for sales, marketing, and revenue operations teams. Unify integrates with CRMs, email platforms, and data providers to enrich contacts and track engagement, focused on signal-based automated outbound rather than inbound lead management.
